title: podman machine ssh argument missing validation
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman machine ssh

2.

3.

**Describe the results you received:**

```
[anders@localhost ~]$ podman machine ssh
panic: runtime error: slice bounds out of range [1:0]

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/podman/v3/cmd/podman/machine.ssh(0x20eb100, 0x2141368, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
	cmd/podman/machine/ssh.go:55 +0x320
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x20eb100, 0x4000184170, 0x0, 0x0, 0x20eb100, 0x4000184170)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:852 +0x320
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x20f6780, 0x400019c010, 0x11cd320, 0x2141368)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:960 +0x268
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:897
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:890
main.Execute()
	cmd/podman/root.go:90 +0xf4
main.main()
	cmd/podman/main.go:38 +0xa4
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Error message, or (preferrably) default vm used.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 3.1.0-dev
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: @afbjorklund I think this is fixed in main branch.  At least I cannot trigger that panic anymore.

I get a slightly different panic, but it seems to still be there (on e6a5c0ffc1df78bf08aa25f4fe734b46a846a5d7)

```console
$ ./bin/podman machine list
NAME        VM TYPE     CREATED      LAST UP
myvm        qemu        11 days ago  10 days ago
$ ./bin/podman machine ssh
panic: runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/podman/v3/cmd/podman/machine.ssh(0x2820b80, 0x28eb058, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
	cmd/podman/machine/ssh.go:81 +0x405
```

It works fine when I remember the argument, but there was some muscle memory from the previous machine...


```go
        switch vmType {
        default:
                vm, err = qemu.LoadVMByName(vmName)
        }
        if err != nil {
                return errors.Wrapf(err, "vm %s not found", args[0])
        }
```

Probably needs another of those "if len(args) > 0" there ? Or "vmName"...
